crime.value: Murder of the Honourable Ronald Adair under unusual and inexplicable circumstances
crime.quote: the murder of the Honourable Ronald Adair under most unusual and inexplicable circumstances

victim.value: The Honourable Ronald Adair, killed under mysterious circumstances that initially baffled investigators
victim.quote: the murder of the Honourable Ronald Adair under most unusual and inexplicable circumstances

closed_world.value: London society and the specific locations where the crimes occurred, including estates and Cambridge
closed_world.quote: all London was interested, and the fashionable world dismayed

culprit_and_motive.value: James, motivated by inheritance disputes and resentment over social laws preventing him from being heir
culprit_and_motive.quote: he deeply resented those social laws which made it impossible

resolution.value: Voluntary confession by James after discovery of Heidegger's body and confrontation with evidence
resolution.quote: He made a complete voluntary confession

investigator.value: Sherlock Holmes, the consulting detective investigating these cases
investigator.quote: Well, well, he excites my curiosity, and I must really know more before I leave him.

suspect_architecture.value: James (nephew with inheritance motive), Hayes (brutal accomplice), Dr. Armstrong (antagonistic physician withholding information)
suspect_architecture.quote: James was eager that I should break the entail...He intended to make a bargain with me--to restore Arthur

red_herring.value: Dr. Armstrong's evasive behavior and taunting note designed to appear as obstruction while potentially protecting patient confidentiality
red_herring.quote: I can assure you that you are wasting your time in dogging my movements

clue_fairness.value: Heidegger's dead body discovery shared with reader before full implications revealed; James's confession details provided to reader
clue_fairness.quote: What brought all his wicked scheme to wreck was your discovery of this man Heidegger's dead body

social_world.value: Aristocratic inheritance laws and entailment system creating resentment; class dynamics between estate holders and servants
social_world.quote: he deeply resented those social laws which made it impossible...He was eager that I should break the entail

alibi.value: Dr. Armstrong's window-in-brougham revelation exposes his awareness of surveillance, undermining his claimed innocence
alibi.quote: I have, as you discovered last night, a window at the back of my brougham

reveal_mechanic.value: Complete voluntary confession by James when confronted with circumstantial evidence, triggered by discovery of Heidegger's body
reveal_mechanic.quote: I taxed him with the deed. He made a complete voluntary confession

media_and_audience.value: London society's interest and dismay at Ronald Adair murder; police investigation details selectively suppressed from public
media_and_audience.quote: all London was interested, and the fashionable world dismayed...a good deal was suppressed upon that occasion

investigator_wound.value: Watson's emotional vulnerability regarding Holmes's return from presumed death, creating 'greatest shock and surprise of any event'
investigator_wound.quote: sudden flood of joy, amazement, and incredulity which utterly submerged my mind

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the return of sherlock holmes
